content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Sausage Maximization". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/282/problem/E
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of sausages. The second line contains n integers, the lengths of the sausages.
content.outputFormat: The maximum number of sausages that can be put in the box.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the sausages by length and then put them in the box one by one until the box is full.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
sausages = list(map(int, input().split()))
sausages.sort()
print(n)
